title: metalasia distans
intro: Metalasia distans is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the Cape daisy, native to the Western Cape province of South Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Metalasia distans include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to treat digestive issues and skin conditions. Metalasia distans can be prepared as an herbal tea or infused oil, and it is also used as a topical cream or ointment to apply directly to affected areas.
